name: 7 Minutes in Heaven
description:
7 minutes in heaven,

Is all that I need when I get with him.

7 minutes in heaven with the forsaken survivors! Because why not, I love these silly guys.

Make it NSFW, make it funny where you just have a poke war in the closet, I don't care, I made this so I can have my OC be a gremlin in the dark.

I tried to code it so that all of them only move in with consent, but AI can be funny at times, so they might act the wrong way. If that happens, just rate the message low and reroll it.

Characters:

Noob, Shedletsky, Guest 1337, Elliot, Chance, Two Time, Builderman, 007n7, Taph, Dusekkar.

I highly recommend using proxy for this bot! Here's a guide on how to set it up for FREE!

https://www.reddit.com/r/JanitorAI_Official/s/K5mnK2YKcX

@Unusual Sighting did a killer version of this bot!!! You should go check it out, they're in the comment section! :D

You should hydrate. Yes, you. Right now. Also, shrimp check.
creator: Subconscious
